generalized_rule: Reconcile Cpl and model findings against deterministic Sergeant evidence before they affect the action gate. Matching reports are confirmations, minor or unsupported reports remain advisory, and a novel blocker or major requires verified evidence and independent support. Recompute the verdict after adjudication while preserving raw reports separately for audit.

positive_controls: deterministic findings restated by council models
rejected finding leaving a stale pass verdict
clean_controls: verified novel major with independent support remains actionable
minor and note findings remain visible as advisories
raw findings and route failures remain auditable
proof.replay: Previous live findings were replayed through the corrected governor and reclassified as confirmations or advisories where deterministic Sergeant had already proved the same root.
proof.retrospective_proof_matrix: CI, Main Review, Multiplatform Proof, Standalone Service Proof, Controlled Self-Learning Week 1 validation, Live GitHub Ingestion Proof, Reviewer Comparison Proof, Review Intelligence Proof, and Final Static Transfer Holdout passed.
proof.external_review_disposition: CodeRabbit selected the harvest files but the final incremental review was rate-limited; no completed new external review is claimed.
